name: Jeremy Rifkin's Black Bean Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Tomatoes, fresh, peeled and chopped OR 1 1/2 cups Tomatoes, canned
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the beans in water overnight.
2. The next day, place the beans in a large pot and cover with 5 cups of water. Bring to a simmer and cook for 1 hour or more until tender.
3. In a frying pan, heat some peanut oil over medium heat. Add the onions, green pepper, and garlic; sauté until the vegetables are soft.
4. Add the cumin, oregano, and dried mustard to the pan with the vegetables. Stir to combine.
5. When the vegetables are lightly browned, add them to the soup pot along with the tomatoes (fresh or canned) and stir well.
6. Cook for an additional 30 minutes until all ingredients are well combined and heated through.
7. If the soup is too thick, add water as needed to reach desired consistency.
8. Just before serving, stir in the lemon juice.
9. Serve the soup with corn chips, guacamole, and a fresh green salad.
